title: Top Headlines of 2008: From Oil Prices to Presidential Elections
description: The article is a table listing major events that occurred in 2008, including the collapse of investment banks, record high oil prices, the Beijing Olympics, and the election of Barack Obama as President of the United States.

title: Top Headlines of 2009: Obama, iPhone, Pandemic, and More
description: The article is a table listing major events that occurred in 2009, including Barack Obama's inauguration, the passing of an economic stimulus package, the H1N1 pandemic, Michael Jackson's death, and the announcement of a troop surge in Afghanistan.

title: Top Events of 2010
description: The article is a list of significant events that occurred in 2010, including natural disasters, political events, and technological advancements.

title: Top Headlines of 2011: From Tragedy to Triumph
description: The article lists significant events that occurred in 2011, including the Arizona shooting, the Arab Spring, the Fukushima disaster, the killing of Osama bin Laden, the News of the World phone hacking scandal, the US credit rating downgrade, the capture and killing of Muammar Gaddafi, the death of Kim Jong-il, and the official withdrawal of US troops from Iraq.

title: Top Headlines of 2012: From Tragedies to Triumphs
description: The article is a list of significant events that occurred in 2012, including the Costa Concordia disaster, Queen Elizabeth II's Diamond Jubilee, the Facebook IPO, the Aurora shooting, and the re-election of Barack Obama as President of the United States.

title: Top Headlines of 2013
description: The article is a table listing major news events that occurred in 2013, including the US Congress avoiding the fiscal cliff, the Boston Marathon bombing, Edward Snowden's NSA leaks, the Kenyan mall attack, and the death of Nelson Mandela.

title: Top Headlines of 2014
description: The article is a list of significant events that occurred in 2014, including the legalization of recreational marijuana in Colorado, the disappearance of Malaysia Airlines Flight 370, the kidnapping of schoolgirls by Boko Haram in Nigeria, and the restoration of diplomatic relations between the United States and Cuba.

title: Top News Headlines of 2015
description: The article lists major events that occurred in 2015, including the Charlie Hebdo shooting, the Nepal earthquake, the legalization of same-sex marriage in the US, and the Paris attacks.

title: Top Headlines of 2016: From Prince to Trump
description: The article lists major events that occurred in 2016, including the election of Donald Trump as President of the United States, terrorist attacks in Brussels and Orlando, and the death of Fidel Castro.

title: 2017 in Review: Major Events and Tragedies
description: The article lists major events that occurred in 2017, including the inauguration of Donald Trump, terrorist attacks in London and Manchester, a missile strike on a Syrian airbase, a white supremacist rally in Charlottesville, and the repeal of net neutrality rules in the United States.

title: Top Headlines of 2018
description: The New York Times has compiled a list of the most significant news events of 2018, including the Hawaii false missile alert, the Florida school shooting, the US-North Korea summit, the Thai soccer team rescue, the Paris protests, and the US government shutdown. Other events include the Russian presidential election, the Southwest Airlines engine failure, the signing of a new trade agreement between the US, Canada, and Mexico, and the passing of a criminal justice reform bill by the US Senate.

title: Top 10 Headlines of 2019
description: The article provides a timeline of significant events that occurred in 2019, including the inauguration of Brazil's new president, the New Zealand mosque shootings, the Notre Dame Cathedral fire, the Women's World Cup, and the impeachment hearings against President Donald Trump.

title: 2020 in Review: Major Events and Headlines
description: A table lists the major events of 2020, including the COVID-19 pandemic, the US presidential election, and various international conflicts and tragedies.

title: Top 10 Global Events of 2021
description: The article summarizes major global events of 2021, including COVID-19 vaccines, Joe Biden's inauguration, the George Floyd verdict, space exploration, climate change action, women's rights, COVID-19 relief, technology advancements, social justice movements, and sports achievements.
